title: 500 Fun Snaps Party Throw Bangers Snappers Packs - Bonfire Night Guy Fawkes New Years Eve Chinese New Year (10 x 50pcs =500), Multicolor
features: Huge Value Pack 500 Fun Snaps - Comes as 10 individual boxes, each containing 50 classic fun snaps, perfect for parties, celebrations, and group entertainment.
Easy & Exciting Party Add-On - Simple to use just throw on a hard surface to create a quick pop sound, adding excitement to festive moments and gatherings.
Perfect for Celebrations & Events - Ideal for Bonfire Night, New Year’s Eve, Chinese New Year, birthdays, outdoor parties, and fun group activities.
Individually Boxed for Convenience - Each pack is small, lightweight, and easy to carry great for party favours, goody bags, event giveaways, and group sharing.
Vibrant Multicolour Packaging - Comes in bright, eye-catching packaging that adds to the festive feel and makes distribution simple and fun.
